title: BABY PROMISE - 211info
text: SOUTH COAST REGIONAL EARLY LEARNING HUB BABY PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers full day quality care and education for eligible children in local early care and education settings. 519 South 7th Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Parents with children from 6 weeks to 3 years. Parents must live or work in Coos, Curry, or Coastal Douglas County, and be currently employed or attending school. Household income must be at or below 200% of the Federal Poverty Level. Coastal Douglas County includes Reedsport. Families from outlying areas in Douglas County can apply if they are willing to travel to a Baby Promise location. Placement in a Baby Promise slot is an exemption to the EDRC waitlist. Regional Baby Promise enrollment partners will collaborate with families and approved Baby Promise providers to identify the family's needs and the regional Baby Promise slots available that meet those needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (458) 710-0902 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 710-0902 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address, proof of income, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Douglas County Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - SOUTH COAST REGIONAL EARLY LEARNING HUB PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
